field_values.action_summary: A chaotic skirmish breaks out between Carter, the Tharks, and the Zodangan guards. Sab Than attempts to strike Dejah Thoris, but Carter intervenes and kills him. Tars Tarkas arrives to secure the platform, leaving only the victors in the hall.
field_values.camera_intent: Handheld/shaky cam for combat melee; Medium shots for group skirmish dynamics; Close-up for fatal blow to Sab Than; Wide shot for post-combat aftermath and fallen guards
field_values.end_state: scene resolves into the next narrative beat
movement_notes: Blood splatter patterns on floor and characters
Character proximity to throne vs Dejah Thoris
field_values.transition_notes:
# Scene Contract: CH025_SC003

## Production Intent
Execute a high-intensity combat climax involving multi-faction skirmishing, culminating in the death of Sab Than and the stabilization of the platform by Tars Tarkas.

## Required Cast
- john_carter
- dejah_thoris
- sab_than
- tars_tarkas
- Thark Warriors
- Zodangan Guards

## Required Environments
- audience_chamber (Throne Room / Audience Chamber)

## Continuity Constraints
- Blood splatter patterns on floor and characters
- Weapon damage/integrity after melee
- Character proximity to throne vs Dejah Thoris

## Beat List
- BT001: Skirmish breaks out between Tharks and Zodangan Guards.
- BT002: Carter intervenes to kill Sab Than.
- BT003: Tars Tarkas secures the platform.
field_values.dialogue_relevance: dialogue supports scene intent and continuity
